ddls:
CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the industry was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the industry's details */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the industry is currently being tracked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index entry */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the index belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the index value was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the stock market index */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the index value was collected from */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the index value was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the index value */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the index value has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indices_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indices_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user's details */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preference belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the user is interested in */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, market movement) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the preference was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the alert is for */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the alert is about */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the alert was triggered */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the alert has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the report is about */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, performance review) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the report */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the report has been shared with other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data source was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data source's details */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data source is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index being validated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the index was collected from */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the data validation was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data validation (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the validation was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the validation record */,
  "validation_details" TEXT /* Details of the validation process (e.g., method used, results) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "help_center" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the help center article or tutorial */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article or tutorial */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the article or tutorial was published */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the article (e.g., guide, tutorial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the article was published */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the article */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the article is currently published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, data access) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log entry was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the event was triggered */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client that triggered the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
